titleStmt.title: SII 40.300: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 300. (A.R. No. B. 345 of 1933.) Vēmavaram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On another slab built into the wall of Mūlaṅkūri temple.
Qutb-Shāhi: Mahamadu Kulli-Pādaśaha (Muhammad Quli Qutb-Shah: 1580-1612 A.D.).
This is dated Śaka 1514, Nandana Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Thursday, corresponding to 1592 A.D., April 4. However the weekday was Tuesday.

Records that after the conquest of the Koṇḍavīdu territory in the time of the king's father Ibhurāmu Pādaśha (Ibrahim Qutb Shah) in Śaka 1502, the local chiftains rebelled against the king and gathered in the Koṇḍavīḍu-sīma in year Khara, and that consequently the king deputed his chief officer Malka-Voḍayalu, to quell the rebellion and restore order in the country. Soon after the march of the officer from Gōlakoṇḍa, the rebels dispersed and the chief, crossing the river Krishṇa entered the sīma and reduced them to subjection. Alludes to the conquest of Uddeyagēri, Vinukoṇḍa, Bellaṁkoṇḍa and Taṅgeḍa and expulsion of Veṅkaṭarāju in the time of Ibrahim Qutb-Shah in Śaka 1502.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulagu 1514 Agu
naṁdana saṁvvatsara vaiśākha śu 3 guruvāraṁnu
tināmayī ca 1 mārānavvālu sana Alapu
Agunēṁḍu mōrimadāvulatula Aliyutalala Ali
tanatala Ayālatula bāhirāmalka Amāmalakavoḍaya
cēśina pratāpadharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu . mādalanu śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbulagu 1502 Agunēṁḍu vikrama saṁvvatsara caitra
15 bhavramavāraṁ nāṁḍu hajarati yibhurāhiṁ pāduśā
he voḍayaluṁgāru tamanāma jādu Aṁpritenudāṭi
gi vuddagiri dākkoni vēṁkkaṭarājuṁdolimuṁṭalulagavaṭṭi vinu
koṁḍḍayu bellamukoṁḍḍa taṁgeḍal pālapa¨rtihariṁcci mari balinigai
koṁḍḍavīḍu ka¨rṇāṭaka rājadhāni yibhurāmuṁḍu bāhubalaṁbu
mīru cū . 1 . yīlāgu pratāpāna koṁḍḍavīṭi rājyaṁ puccukōni rā
jyaṁ paripāliṁstunnuvuṁḍḍenu . yilitalayi bhūrāhimapāduśāha pu
tṛṁḍu mahammadu kullipāduśāha voḍayaluṁgāru tanu yi sanahalu
rabbilasāninipa bukuṁḍai rājyaṁ paripāliṁstutṛṁḍaṁgānu kharasaṁ
raṁlōnu bhalairāya sābāji Ālamakhānuṁḍu khānākhānā modalainavāru
nāyakaḍḍu kaulunnu tirugāṁjaḍiharāṁkhō¨rlai koṁḍḍavīṭi śīmalōnu vuṁ
ḍaṁgānu hajarati pāduśahā voḍayaluṁgāru tama paṭṭānaku prathānilayina mala A
malkaṁ śalavu Icci yī tiraṁgaṁbaḍḍa harāṁbō¨rlanu daṁḍiṁci śīmakuduru paraci
raṁmmani śalavu dayacēstēnu Ālāge rājuṁgāri Ānati kramāna malkavoḍayalu
gāru golakoṁḍḍa vēllivaccinanna khabaru vini yī harāṁbolu . A Iravāṁḍlu Aṁddarunnu sūya
dayaṁ AItēnu ciṁkaṭlu viccipōyinaṭṭēya yikkaḍivāṁḍlu Akkaḍanēyadhāyadhalai pāri
pōyē malka voḍayalugārunnu kriṣṇadāṁṭi śīmalōki vijayaṁ ceśi durga
histē pālucēśi harāṁbō¨rlu Ayinavāṁḍla nellānu Ājñalu
Digital edition of SII 40.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
